prompt.content: Can you make a new sheet with 3 small groups of students that scored 85% or better on the final exam using the student data from the Grade Book. I want each group to have a mix of student ability levels based on their scores on the exam; at least one and at most three students who scored between 90% and 95%. At least one for 85% to 89%. I'm thinking 6 students per group at most.
